name: Duolingo
description:
You missed your Spanish lesson...

I made this bot due to boredom and because I suddenly remembered I had to do my daily lesson while chatting with a random bot. But feel free to try good ol’ Duo out, and hopefully not die while trying to convince him to give you your 100+ days streak back. English isn’t my first language and so, this may be poorly written.
creator: Mehere
